items.question: Is PaintKit free to use?
items.answer: PaintKit is completely free. Upload a photo and your browser automatically generates a numbered paint diagram. No images are sent to any server.

items.question: What output sizes are supported?
items.answer: A5, A4, and A3 print sizes are supported, along with Korean canvas frame sizes (F4–F50). Export as a 300dpi high-resolution PDF in any supported size.

items.question: How many colors can I use?
items.answer: Choose from 8 to 48 colors. We recommend 24 colors for beginners, 36 for intermediate, and 48 for advanced users.

items.question: What is Color Guide mode?
items.answer: Color Guide mode lightly tints each region with its assigned paint color before you paint. Great for beginners who want a visual reference while working.

items.question: Is my photo private?
items.answer: Yes. Your photo never leaves your device. All processing happens entirely in your browser.
